holdings.infoBox: BCHP is an equity ETF with a total of 22 individual holdings. The top holdings are Amazon.com stock at 13.64%, Microsoft at 10.63%, NVIDIA at 9.73%, Brookfield at 9.04%, and Alphabet at 5.48%.

overview.description: The Principal Focused Blue Chip ETF (BCHP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed, non-transparent ETF that invests in large-cap growth companies globally. The fund uses the Fidelity non-transparent model BCHP was launched on Jul 13, 2023 and is issued by Principal.
